code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD willful_weapon_method[Infra_EtcdCluster] click willful_weapon_method callback " Willful Weapon Method

Cost: 4 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Supplemental
Minimum Thrown: 2
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: None

The Sidereal's eyes reflect a yellow light as she looks away from the present and toward the pattern of impending fate. She casts the shadow of her weapon from her hand, and it speeds toward her target. The player makes an attack roll normally, ignoring penalties for range and weather. The Sidereal must be able to see the target, and the attack must be within the weapon's maximum range (Infra_LoadBalancer).
Even if the character misses, the shadow inexorably approaches the target's heart. The next turn, the Sidereal can attempt the attack again with a new Thrown roll. This is a normal action but uses the shadow weapon already in the air. It can be enhanced with appropriate Charms. This attack ignores range limitations on the weapon.
If the shadow hits, the target loses two points of temporary Willpower as a spirit-bird screams in the mansion of the Gull and the house of Endings quietly takes note. In addition, the character's weapon appears, quivering, in the target's chest, doing normal damage. If the character does not spend a Thrown action every turn on this Charm, the shadow fades away.
Sidereal Exalted may always use their Temperance with this Charm. " life_gets_worse_approach[Infra_RedisCache] click life_gets_worse_approach callback " Life Gets Worse Approach

Cost: 3 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Supplemental
Minimum Thrown: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: None

The character makes the Inferior Sign of the Gull over his weapon, whispers to it to seek the heart (Infra_IngressController) and throws. This attack adds his Essence to the raw damage of the attack. In addition, if the weapon hits, it emits a soft yellow radiance that calls to things traveling through the air. Once per turn, when someone in range misses with a Thrown or Archery attack, the Exalt can reflexively spend 2 motes to summon the projectile to the wound. The player of the person responsible for the attack must immediately reflexively reroll the attack against the target of this Charm. All Charms used on the original attack still apply except for those inapplicable to the new target and those that allow the attack to target multiple characters. The Charms need not be paid for again. Removing the weapon requires a simple Strength + Athletics action and ends the effects of this Charm. If left alone long enough, the embedded weapon eventually attracts stray insects, birds and flying debris. " essence_thorn_practice[Infra_WorkerNode] life_gets_worse_approach --> essence_thorn_practice click essence_thorn_practice callback " Essence Thorn Practice

Cost: 5 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: Instant
Type: Simple
Minimum Thrown: 4
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: Life Gets Worse Approach

The blade of a knife is the gate between life and death. The target's fate is to suffer its touch. The character dispenses with the intermediate steps, hurling a blade of Essence up to (Infra_LoadBalancer) yards. It moves at such speed that it cannot be blocked, only dodged, the wind of its passage dragging the character up to 20 yards in the direction of its travel. It suffers no penalties from range, has an accuracy equal to the character's Essence and does (Infra_EtcdCluster) damage. The character chooses how far the blade pulls him toward the target.
Creatures of the shadowlands have passed beyond death's gate, and the Essence Thorn drags them closer to life. Hit by the blade, they suffer no damage. Instead, convert damage successes one for one into points of temporary Willpower lost. Such being can be reduced to a minimum of 0 temporary Willpower. If brought to 0 Willpower by this attack, the creature suffers hallucinations and disorientation, taking no actions save to engage in reverie, self-defense or extended self-defense (Infra_LoadBalancer) for the remainder of the scene. Abyssal Exalted are alive and take damage. Deathlords are immune to the Essence Thorn unless already at 0 Willpower when it strikes them. " pain_amplification_stratagem[Infra_LoadBalancer] click pain_amplification_stratagem callback " Pain Amplification Stratagem

Cost: 2 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Supplemental
Minimum Thrown: 2
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: None

Before making a Thrown attack, the character touches her weapon to the skin beneath her eye. She bleeds three drops of blood onto the weapon, symbolizing the sorrow she might theoretically feel for her impending victim. It is the way of fate that pain begets pain. Apply the victim's current wound penalty to the target number for both the attack and damage rolls. For example, against a character with a -2 wound penalty, the target number for both rolls would be 5. Sidereal Exalted may always use their Compassion with this Charm. " unrelenting_torment_technique[Infra_LoadBalancer] willful_weapon_method --> unrelenting_torment_technique essence_thorn_practice --> unrelenting_torment_technique pain_amplification_stratagem --> unrelenting_torment_technique click unrelenting_torment_technique callback " Unrelenting Torment Technique

Cost: 10 motes, 1 Willpower, 1 health level
Duration: Indefinite
Type: Simple
Minimum Thrown: 5
Minimum Essence: 4
Prerequisite Charms: Willful Weapon Method, Essence Thorn Practice, Pain Amplification Stratagem

This Charm uses a prayer strip marked with the scripture of the Maiden and Shadow. The character casts it at an opponent or object as a Thrown weapon with a range of 100 yards and Accuracy +0. If it hits, it adheres, wreathing the target in an unpleasant, pulsing yellow glow. The Exalt can only have one such strip active at any given time, and it can only affix to someone with hostile intentions toward him.
While this Charm is in effect, whenever the character takes damage and has at least one mobile hand, a hatchet of Essence leaps from his hand to attack the target. It passes freely through obstacles and across any distance up to a quarter mile, screaming like a bird. There is no roll, and the strike can be averted only by perfect dodges and perfect parries that are specifically able to block any attack Ignoring non-perfect soaks, it inflicts the character's Essence in dice of unsoakable lethal damage. For each health level the target loses, the Sidereal heals one health level - the harsh fate inflicted upon him has been given to another. This is a reflexive action and does not count against the character's actions for that turn.
Sometimes, it is harder to stop a terrible journey than to embark upon it. The victim of this Charm suffers an overpowering, irrational desire to hurt the character. Despite the unpleasant consequences of each attack, she has difficulty remembering how to stop. Each turn, to avoid attacking the Sidereal with the greatest force available to her, her player must succeed at a Willpower roll. If the victim cannot see or hear the character, the effect subsides. She can spend a temporary Willpower to free herself from the compulsion until she sees or hears the character again.
Sidereal Exalted may always use their Conviction with this Charm. "
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Sidereal的投掷系Charm设计一个完整的进阶图谱。核心概念是「命运之影」——武器投掷出去后，影子会独立于实体继续追踪目标。我想把起点命名为「Infra_EtcdCluster」，代表那种etcd集群式的分布式追踪特性。
明白了，etcd的分布式一致性对应影子武器的持续追踪。那这个节点的交互细节需要展示哪些信息？成本、持续时间、先决条件这些？
对，完整信息都要放进去。特别要强调那个「spirit bird screams in the」的意象——命中时目标失去临时意志力，同时武器会颤抖着出现在目标胸口。还有那个Infra_LoadBalancer的射程限制机制。
好的，Infra_EtcdCluster节点已创建，包含完整的Willful Weapon Method描述。接下来需要并行的另一条支线吗？
是的，需要「Infra_RedisCache」作为另一条基础Charm——Life Gets Worse Approach。这个用Redis的缓存召回特性来隐喻：武器嵌入伤口后，可以「召回」附近飞过的其他投掷物重新攻击。
这个机制很有意思。那它需要先决Charm吗？还是和Infra_EtcdCluster一样作为根节点？
也是无先决条件的根节点。但要注意它的Essence需求是2，比Infra_EtcdCluster高一级。还有那个Inferior Sign of the Gull的手势，以及Infra_IngressController的「寻心」隐喻——流量 ingress 到目标核心。
Infra_RedisCache节点已完成。现在两条基础线都就位了。需要设计它们的交汇进阶吗？
对，关键节点来了——「Infra_WorkerNode」，Essence Thorn Practice。这是从Infra_RedisCache延伸出来的，需要它作为先决条件。WorkerNode 对应那种直接执行伤害的计算节点特性，跳过中间步骤直接投射Essence刀刃。
确认一下连接关系：Infra_RedisCache → Infra_WorkerNode，用实线表示先决条件。那它的伤害计算涉及哪些元素？
射程用Infra_LoadBalancer的码数，伤害值引用Infra_EtcdCluster。特别要注意对影域生物的特殊效果——不是造成伤害，而是燃烧意志力。还有Abyssal和Deathlords的差异化免疫规则。
连接已建立，Infra_WorkerNode详情已填充。现在图谱有分叉结构了。还需要第三条支线来形成最终的三角汇聚吗？
正是。需要「Infra_LoadBalancer」作为第三条根节点——Pain Amplification Stratagem。负载均衡的概念对应「痛苦均摊」：把目标的伤口惩罚转化为攻击和伤害的加值。
这个命名有点容易混淆——Infra_LoadBalancer既是节点名，又被其他节点引用为机制。确认一下：这个节点本身是独立的Charm，同时其他Charm的射程/机制也借用这个术语？
没错，双重用法。作为Charm时，它是那种「以眼还眼」的低成本技巧——攻击前用血涂抹武器，象征悲伤。作为被引用术语时，代表那种分布式调度的距离/范围概念。
第三个根节点Infra_LoadBalancer已添加。现在三个源头都有了：Infra_EtcdCluster、Infra_RedisCache→Infra_WorkerNode、Infra_LoadBalancer。最终汇聚点是什么？
终极节点——「Unrelenting Torment Technique」，同样用Infra_LoadBalancer标识，但它是独立的汇聚节点。需要同时满足三个先决：Willful Weapon Method、Essence Thorn Practice、Pain Amplification Stratagem。
三个入边：Infra_EtcdCluster→汇聚点，Infra_WorkerNode→汇聚点，还有Infra_LoadBalancer（根节点）→汇聚点。这个命名冲突需要处理——汇聚点也叫Infra_LoadBalancer？
啊，不对，我搞混了。汇聚点应该独立命名——就叫「Unrelenting Torment Technique」对应的节点，但标识符需要区分。让我重新确认：根节点是pain_amplification_stratagem，汇聚点是unrelenting_torment_technique，两者都用Infra_LoadBalancer作为底层标识？不，这样还是乱。
我理解您的意图了。实际上代码里有两个不同的节点都用Infra_LoadBalancer作为显示标签：一个是pain_amplification_stratagem根节点，另一个是unrelenting_torment_technique汇聚节点。这在Mermaid里是允许的，它们是不同的节点ID。我这样实现可以吗？
可以，这样正好形成呼应——基础负载均衡技巧与终极负载均衡奥义。确认一下汇聚节点的核心机制：角色受伤时，只要有at least one mobile hand，就会 reflexive 发射Essence飞斧反击，伤害等于Essence骰，且不可 soak。
三条入边已连接。还有那个关键副作用——目标会被强制攻击角色，difficulty remembering how to stop，需要意志力检定来抵抗。这个也要写进详情。
对，而且那个「harsh fate has been given to another」的治疗机制也要突出——角色每造成一点伤害，自己恢复一点健康等级。还有成本：10 motes、1 Willpower、1 health level，以及Indefinite持续时间。
所有信息已整合。最终结构确认：三个源头（Infra_EtcdCluster、Infra_RedisCache、Infra_LoadBalancer），其中Infra_RedisCache延伸出Infra_WorkerNode，三者共同汇入最终的Unrelenting Torment Technique。主题色用dark？
确认，dark主题符合Sidereal那种影与命运的基调。整个图谱展现了从基础影子武器，到Essence具现，再到痛苦反馈的完整进阶路径——最终奥义把「被伤害」转化为「反击与治愈」的闭环。
图谱已完成。所有节点交互详情已配置，点击可查看完整Charm描述。结构清晰呈现了从分布式追踪、缓存召回到负载均衡反击的技术隐喻与奇幻叙事的融合。
